title: MarkdownChat
description: Implements markdown-style chat formatting in Minecraft using the MineDown library.
body: # MarkdownChat [](https://modrinth.com/plugin/markdownchat) [](https://github.com/carolinaisslaying) [](https://discord.gg/VVTJhkKc4G) ## About This is a simplistic and lightweight plugin that allows you to use Markdown in your server's Minecraft chat. It implements Phoenix616's [MineDown library](https://github.com/Phoenix616/MineDown). This plugin has been made with compatibility of Paper and Folia in mind. Due to its simplistic nature, it may not function correctly with other chat plugins. Please [report these issues](https://github.com/carolinaisslaying/MarkdownChat/issues) to me and I will look into fixing them. In most instances, it should work fine. ## Installation Drag and drop the plugin's download into your server `plugins` folder, then restart the server, and voila! You now have full markdown syntax available. This plugin has been tested and works on both Paper & Folia 1.20.x and 1.21.x. ## Syntax The the full syntax provided by the MineDown library is available [here](https://wiki.phoenix616.dev/library/minedown/syntax). Simply use the syntax in a regular global chat message, and voila! ## Permissions This plugin defaults to allowing all users to use markdown chat formatting, however, it has a permission node `markdownchat.use` if you wish to limit who can utilise the chat formatting. ![Demonstration image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adaf4129c05e815aa0c4b5a6fc7b1d333753f1e6.png)
